name: Clear Ribbed Acrylic Tray with Black Mirror - Threshold™
description:
Bring a functional update to your vanity or bath space with the Clear Ribbed Mirror with Tray from Threshold™. This black mirror comes with a built-in tray at the bottom to help provide ample space for keeping your jewelry, cosmetics and other essentials handy. The tray features a ribbed design to add a classic appeal to your space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
